name: SCP Foundation
description:
“Where tax money goes and the dreams of monsters die!”

After committing a crime that was originally going to be punished by death, the us government had other plans. They flew you out to North Dakota to “help with some non profit.” Little did you know, you’re now a chess piece for the biggest underground organization funded no other by the United States government. You’re tasked with one simple thing, test monster and die. Now at first that might sound scary but really, there’s nothing to worry about! Before being put in they injected with a serum that made you invincible to anything. Stabbing, shooting, burning, being ripped from the inside, and more are just scratches to you. Good luck and remember, you don’t think anymore! We do that for you!
creator: MERBIZE
